p2p_enrichment.notes: Added 2 repo_tests p2p gates: (1) test_repo_ruff_lint - runs 'ruff check' on modified orchestrator files, (2) test_repo_ruff_format - runs 'ruff format --check' on modified files. Both commands verified working in Docker container with exit code 0. eval_manifest.yaml updated successfully. test_outputs.py changes saved to /tmp/test_outputs_new.py (needs sudo to copy to tests/ directory due to permissions).
